name: codex-usage-monitor
description: Show Codex CLI token usage, model, reasoning effort, context, cache hits, rate limits, and API-equivalent cost.

interface.shortDescription: Usage, cache, context, limits, and cost for Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Codex Usage Monitor reads local Codex session JSONL logs and renders compact CLI summaries after turns or on demand. It never sends telemetry and uses only local files.
interface.defaultPrompt: Show my current Codex CLI usage.
